title: Refined Torches
description: This resourcepack gives torches, campfires and lanterns a cleaner, more detailed look, with subtle animations and a vanilla-friendly style
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac182bc3589fc1d09ffb1f8ebfdb77707b8e4332.png)
[![Discord Server](https://img.shields.io/discord/1446530427337576541?style=for-the-badge&logo=Discord&logoColor=white&label=Discord&color=728ADA)](https://discord.gg/2P8kfceSmt) [![CurseForge Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1483746?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&logoColor=white&label=curseforge&color=F16436)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/refined-torches) [![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/M6aa729D?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&logoColor=white&label=Modrinth&color=1CD96A)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/refined-torches)
![Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/899c0e364c509449cd21d46c78cd5a7775ff9951.png) This resource pack gives torches, lanterns and campfires a refined 3D look, adding more depth and detail while keeping that vanilla feel. The inventory icons stay 2D by default, so it works nicely with other packs that tweak sprites. ![tocha2](https://i.imgur.com/TFnVDbO.gif) It also includes subtle animations, and if you're using [InteractiveStuff](https://modrinth.com/mod/interactivestuff), [HMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-my-items) or [Punchy!](https://modrinth.com/mod/punchy-fpa), you'll get some extra animated touches in-hand too. it's also compatible with [Fresh Animations: Player Extension](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fa-player-extension) or [Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations) if you prefer a more vanilla feel! (you have to turn the compats on using [Respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts)) ![teste](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/M6aa729D/images/13aaa161352e8f7ce8389e55947e1dcdf3a9ac68.webp)
![Important](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6570fc1c8af37836ab6d9863e9b10a47862ff43.png)
Recommended Mods
Required Mods on 1.21.5 and below
![extra](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d7617a2089b78091525c99f005816d975744d69_0.webp)
Credits
This resource pack integrates assets from the following projects:
* **[Fresh Animations: Player Extension](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fa-player-extension)** * **[Fire Rekindled](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fire-rekindled)**

> **Note:** All credits go to the original creators. These assets are used with explicit permission from the authors.
